elements.content: This regression proves that a zone host can begin in the current page chunk and continue later when authored as continue plus spanning, instead of collapsing back to the conservative move-whole behavior.

Main zone opening paragraph. This should appear on the first page when the spanning continuation path is active. Main zone opening paragraph. This should appear on the first page when the spanning continuation path is active. Main zone opening paragraph. This should appear on the first page when the spanning continuation path is active.

Main zone middle paragraph. It keeps the regional simulation going across the next frame. Main zone middle paragraph. It keeps the regional simulation going across the next frame. Main zone middle paragraph. It keeps the regional simulation going across the next frame. Main zone middle paragraph. It keeps the regional simulation going across the next frame. Main zone middle paragraph. It keeps the regional simulation going across the next frame.

Main zone tail paragraph. This should survive into the continuation frame if the first one fills up. Main zone tail paragraph. This should survive into the continuation frame if the first one fills up. Main zone tail paragraph. This should survive into the continuation frame if the first one fills up. Main zone tail paragraph. This should survive into the continuation frame if the first one fills up.

A persistent side rail should be able to begin in the first frame and keep filling its own regional frame independently as later chunks intersect the same zone.
